body: Quick reply - will follow up properly tomorrow.\n\n- Gloria
subject: Re: Survey Progress Note - Reminder

body:
Dear Dr. Hoffmann,

Please find attached the interim progress report for the DFG grant supporting the North Frisian Medieval Wreck Survey (Site NF-7). We have completed the Phase 3 dive planning and begun timber sampling. A no-cost extension request will follow under separate cover.

With kind regards,
Dr. Gloria Gross
subject: DFG Interim Report - North Frisian Wreck Survey

body:
Dear Frida,

Attached are the updated gallery layout drafts for the Hanseatic Wreck exhibition. I have annotated the placement of the bow assemblage and the conservation note panels. Could your team review before our Thursday call?

Warm regards,
Gloria
subject: Exhibition Layout - Draft 3 for Review

body:
Hallo Nils,

The research vessel charter for the August field season is confirmed pending the harbour permit. Please coordinate with Ailo on the dive team rota and the side-scan sonar checklist.

Danke,
Gloria
subject: August Field Season - Charter & Dive Rota

body:
Dear Prof. Whitfield,

Thank you for agreeing to join the consortium proposal. I am drafting the Horizon Europe work packages and would value your input on WP3 (remote sensing). A short call next week?

Best wishes,
Gloria
subject: Horizon Europe Consortium - WP3 Draft

body:
Dear colleagues,

A reminder that monograph chapter drafts are due 30 June. Please send figures as layered files so the illustrator can finalise the plates. The reconstruction sections still need scale bars.

Thank you,
Gloria
subject: Monograph - Chapter Drafts Due 30 June
